name: Sete Cidades
description: Twin volcanic lakes — one green, one blue — sitting inside a dramatic caldera. Best viewed from Vista do Rei overlook. Allow half a day to walk the crater rim trail.

name: Furnas Valley
description: Active geothermal valley with bubbling fumaroles and hot springs. Try cozido das Furnas — a stew slow-cooked underground. Terra Nostra park has a warm mineral pool.

name: Pico Mountain
description: Portugal's highest peak at 2,351m. Guided ascent takes ~5 hours up, 3 hours down. Permit required — book well in advance. Views extend to neighboring islands on clear days.
